description:
CleverTap is a SaaS based mobile analytics and mobile marketing company that provides mobile app analytics and user engagement products. In this episode of This is my Architecture, Francis from CleverTap describes how they setup and manage 100% isolated environments in various AWS regions to comply with their customers data hosting requirements. CloudFormation, CodeBuild, CodePipeline and containers orchestrated with ECS enable them to express everything as code.
